abbreviations.definition: repeat the sequence of loops in brackets L times

materials: YarnArt JEANS (55% cotton, 45% Polyacrylic) Color No.:29
YarnArt Dolce Baby (100% Micro Polyester) Color No.: 80361

rounds.rawInstruction: Start 10 sc in a magic ring
rounds.summary: Work ten single crochets into a magic ring.
rounds.title: 1st row

rounds.summary: Work ten single crochets for three rows.
rounds.title: 2-4 th

rounds.summary: Increase four times, then work six single crochets.
rounds.title: 5 th

rounds.summary: Repeat the sequence of one single crochet and one increase seven times.
rounds.title: 6 th

rounds.summary: Work twenty-one single crochets for five rounds.
rounds.title: 7-11 th

rounds.summary: Work two decreases, then ten single crochets.
rounds.title: 12 th

rounds.summary: Work twelve single crochets.
rounds.title: 13 th

rounds.rawInstruction: Stuff (it will only be in my head)
rounds.summary: Add stuffing to the head.
rounds.title: Stuff (it will only be in my head)

rounds.summary: Work one decrease, then ten single crochets.
rounds.title: 13 th

rounds.summary: Work eleven single crochets for seventy rounds.
rounds.title: 14-83 th

rounds.summary: Work one decrease, then nine single crochets.
rounds.title: 84 th

rounds.summary: Work ten single crochets.
rounds.title: 85 th

rounds.summary: Work one decrease, then eight single crochets.
rounds.title: 86 th

rounds.summary: Work nine single crochets.
rounds.title: 87 th

rounds.summary: Work one decrease, then seven single crochets.
rounds.title: 88 th

rounds.rawInstruction: Next, insert the wire into the body, pre-bend the edges of the wire
rounds.summary: Insert and shape the wire inside the body.
rounds.title: Next, insert the wire into the body, pre-bend the edges of the wire

rounds.summary: Work one decrease, then six single crochets.
rounds.title: 89 th

rounds.summary: Work one decrease, then five single crochets.
rounds.title: 90 th

rounds.summary: Work six single crochets for two rounds.
rounds.title: 91-92 th

rounds.summary: Close the remaining six stitches.
rounds.title: Close 6 loops.

rounds.rawInstruction: We glue the eyes and embroider the eyebrows.
rounds.summary: Attach the eyes and embroider eyebrows.
rounds.title: We glue the eyes and embroider the eyebrows.
